title: More items forge
description: This mod has added some lapis lazuli tools to the game and fixed a bug in Mojang removing the "Enchanted Golden Apple" recipe 😉
body:
Mod made with MCreator.
This mod has added some tools to the game and fixed a bug : Mojang removing the "Enchanted Golden Apple" recipe 😉

In 1.0.0 version,I only added lapis lazuli tools in the mod.
Perhaps there will be some bugs.
If you discover a bug, please provide feedback on Bilibili or Github
My Bilibili account: https://space.bilibili.com/1993324428
My Github account: Ericyo_MC
